contraindications: Do not use if you have a known allergy to plants in the Asteraceae family.
interactions: May intensify the effects of sedative medicines and coumarin anticoagulants.
pregnancy_warning_text: Pregnancy: keep to ordinary dietary amounts unless a qualified practitioner advises otherwise.
allergy_note: Possible cross-reaction with ragweed, chrysanthemums, marigolds, and daisies.
